feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Web Services
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Web Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to programatically know if a user is active on a ABAP webdynpro screen?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

    I have a ABAP webdynpro application. A user can open the app in change mode by pressing the edit button on the webdynpro screen. First user1 has opened the app in browser. After few mins user2 also opens the same app . Then I want to know programatically if user1 is already active and editing the ABAP webdynpro screen. How to get this in ABAP webdynpro code? I have tried storing the userid and timestamp in a custom table when a user opens the app in browser. For this i have used hook methid WDDOINIT. In WDDOEXIT i delete this entry from the custom table. However this will not tell me if another user is still active on the app screen. User might open and keep the screen idle for 1 hr or more. Or user might be working on the app screen and suddently has his system crash. The entry for the user will remain in the custom table on sudden system crash because WDDOEXIT will not be called in such a case. I intent is to see if another is still doing changes to the webdynpro app and if yes then do not allow the 2nd user to open the same webdynpro app in change mode. Incase if the 1st user is inactive due to system crash or has just kept the webdynpro idle then close this user session and allow 2nd user to open the webdynpro app in change mode. How can i achieve this?

Thanks & Regards,

Gopa

entry.title: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Details in ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Can anyone help me how to retrieve the authentication data like user name in logical port? In tcode SOAMANAGER > Service Administration > Web Service Configuration then Search by Consumer Proxy then Display. I would like to get the userID in ABAP program. Can someone help me know in what table were they stored?

From my side I have used ST05 to trace the webservice update process. But I couldn't find related data from the table which listed by ST05 like SRT_CFG_DIR, SRT_CFG_CLI_ASGN, SRT_RTC_CFGVAL, SRT_RTC_DATA, etc.....

Is the authentication data not stored in SAP table or it stored as some encrypt  format? I only need to get the Logical Port authentication UserID to generate a report to list it for different configuration connection.

entry.title: Disable web service navigator
entry.content:
Hello,

As part of Vulnerability scan for our systems, we would like to disable the Web Services Navigator service in the ABAP systems. Kindly let us know how to do the steps to disable the same. 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Request to share the steps involved in exporting Web Services
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have a scenario where “Web-Services” are getting wiped out post performing system refresh and we need to manually re-configure the web-services again to regain the functionality.

 

So, we request to kindly share the pre-steps that are involved in taking export of web-services; so that we can re-import the configuration settings / export post completion of refresh activities.

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: webservice system cant change ， system is default
entry.content:
HI，buys，i have a question.

enter CWT , but system is CWP, tks.

entry.title: Error while parsing wsdl
entry.content:
I am going to consume WSDL in SAP system. The web service is  Detecno  CFDI Manager 4.0 (created in other system). But when i go to create logical port for it through SOAMANAGER the system generate a message of error:

The following premises were verified: https://transport-freight-management.docs.developers.aeb.com/docs/s4-hana-erp-connection-trouble-shooting

I would be grateful for any hints.

Regards, Tatsiana

entry.title: SOAMANAGER Webservice - FM is not getting line items in Table Parameter
entry.content:
Hi All

I have created a webservice using SE37 RFC Function Module, having an Import parameter and Tables Parameter.

While passing data from SoapUI, Import Parameter is receiving the values which were passed whereas table parameter is showing the appended line item, but all values/columns of item are initial. Whereas Logs and XML Payload of SOAMANAGER is showing that Table item is having same items which were passed to SAP using SoapUI.

 

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:sap-com:document:sap:soap:functions:mc-style">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<urn:ZfiInterface>
<Check>X</Check>
<ItFile>
<!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
<item>
<BILL_MONTH>202301</BILL_MONTH>
<READ_DATE>20230101</READ_DATE>
<DUE_DATE>20230102</DUE_DATE>
<BATCH>01</BATCH>
<SNO>1</SNO>
</item>
</ItFile>
<ItReturn2>
<!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
<item>
<Type></Type>
<Id></Id>
<Number></Number>
<Message></Message>
<LogNo></LogNo>
<LogMsgNo></LogMsgNo>
<MessageV1></MessageV1>
<MessageV2></MessageV2>
<MessageV3></MessageV3>
<MessageV4></MessageV4>
<Parameter></Parameter>
<Row></Row>
<Field></Field>
<System></System>
</item>
</ItReturn2>
</urn:ZfiInterface>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: Best way to Send Huge volume of data from On premise S/4HANA to non SAP aplicaitons
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to send few of S/4HANA standard table data to non SAP applicaitons for anlaytics purpose on daily basis. We have On premise S/4HANA 2021 version. Which is the best way to send huge data on daily basis to non SAP applications

entry.title: Activation of CREDITMANAGEMENTACCOUNTBYIDQU1 web service
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the standard web service CREDITMANAGEMENTACCOUNTBYIDQU1 which doesn't work on the production environment, I would like to activate it, can you please tell me how?

THANKS

entry.title: Configure the SWFVISU for Parked document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently trying to create the visualization parameters on SWFVISU for displaying header and item information of 'Parked Document' (Business Object: FIPP) I was looking for the corresponding My Inbox FIORI Service, and i came up with one service 'Verify Journal Entries in General Ledger - For Processor (Inbox)',

I tried to fill all the parameters in my custom task (TS90000084) based on standard task,

 

however, it didnt work and it showed error 

Can anyone share the correct visualization parameter for custom decision task of Parked Document (FIPP)?

 

Regards,

Muhammad Febrian Rizky

entry.title: FM writes file to al11
entry.content:
hi,

I need to write a .csv file to AL11 via report.

Can anyone tell me which FM i can use?

 

thank you

hi,

I have to do a Select with an internal table in Inner Join, but I get this error:

entry.title: Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX
entry.content:
Hi Experts

System: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud.

We are trying to trigger the SOAP API CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST for Sales Order Confirmation as an EDI output, this is an outbound scenario to send Sales order confirmation from SAP S/4HANA (Private Cloud) to SAP Integration Suite which will further map the message and send to 3rd party system.

but encountering an issue where the service is not being called, we are getting this error in the output processing,

Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX

  • The Logical port has been created in SOAMANAGER
  • NACE configuration has been done to configure the respective program and form routine as per SAP documentation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/19d48293097f4a2589433856b034dfa5/cf829dd7c1ef4eb08eca4575c2e518ff.html

In Debugging via program RSNAST00:

The code is trying to determine provider applications (technical receiver) in the below code, which fails and this error is thrown, any idea how and where to maintain the provider application/technical receiver?

Any documentation link will be helpful.

 

Thanks

Deepak

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: Error : SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("Connection closed")
entry.content:
Hi ABAP gurus, 

I have created a Service Consumer using Proxy Class with WSDL provided to connect to the third party system. I have similarly designed other Service Consumer using Proxy Class which are working fine and data is being received by third party system.

However, for one different functionality for which i have done similar SOAMANAGER configuration activity, the class method call of the Proxy class is giving the error message : SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("Connection closed") and it is being captured in TRY- ENDTRY block using CATCH statement.

Reference sample code below : 

I also searched SAP community but could not find any solution.

Kindly let me know what can be the probable solution for this error.

Thanks in advance. 

Devendra

entry.title: How does SAP SLT send messages to Web Services?
entry.content:
I want to use SLT and Data Services to synchronize data from SAP HANA Database to PostgreSQL in real-time.

1. Firstly, I configured a DS task

2. Then I added it to the real-time service

3. Then I published it to Web Services

 

My question is how to use SLT to send real-time messages to web services? Do I need to use RFC? Can someone help me.

entry.title: SOAP Sales order API - data type enhancetype
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we are trying to extend AXA sales order API with table type using data type enhancement to pass header textes, we have added table type but problem is it not available in any of enhancements of sales order.

Sales order(AXA) - SalesOrderBulkRequest_In

Please find the screenshot of data type enhacement. can you please suggest how can we save textes for data type enhancment?

Thanks

entry.title: CL_HTTP_CLIENT Multipart - XML as string and a seperate XML file
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

im currently implementing a Webservice. I have to transfer a XML string and a seperate XML file via POST request. I'm currently struggeling with the multipart handling for the XML string. 

Does anybody have a working code example? I already tried adding multipart data with set_form_field and set_cdata for the XML string. 

The HTTP Request should look like this: 

 

POST /documents?template_name=library%2sample.template&document_name=ps_demo08&user_id=TechUser HTTP/1.1
Authorization: Bearer {{bearer_token}}
Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: {{apiKey}}
User: Technical User 
Password: Technical Password
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=---011000010111000001101001
Host: host.net
Content-Length: 308

-----011000010111000001101001
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="xml"

<?xml version="1.0" encodiing= "utf-8"?>
-----011000010111000001101001
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="zugferd"

\\share\User\Downloads\sample.xml
-----011000010111000001101001--

 

 

Thanks for helping.

entry.title: Email triggered by SOST adds a prefix to link
entry.content:
I'm sending and email by SOST which has a link to its body in this pattern:

|<a href='https://sample.site.com.br/ '> https://sample.site.com.br/</a> | 

However, when I open this email message and click on this link by SOST or email box, it has a kind of SAP HTML Viewer prefix:

saphtmlp://htmlviewer.sap.com/mVBy5V6l7k{ltUSr8nfZYk/' https://sample.site.com.br/ '

Do you know where can I configure it in order to remove this HTML Viewer link?

 saphtmlp://htmlviewer.sap.com/mVBy5V6l7k{ltUSr8nfZYk/' '

entry.title: Service Consumption Model for SuccessFactors Compound Employee API (SOAP) - Invalid SessionID
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am consuming SuccessFactors' Compound Employee API (SOAP) using the Service Consumption Model (Web Service) in ABAP Cloud. The methods (Login, Query, Logout, etc.) were generated from the SOAP WSDL file.

While the Login method successfully provides the SessionID in the response, I encounter an error, "Invalid SessionID", when calling the Query method.

In CPI, this is managed internally by the SuccessFactors adapter, and in SOAP UI, it is handled using the 'Maintain HTTP session' option. However, I am unsure how to implement similar behavior in ABAP Cloud to ensure the session is maintained across calls.

I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions on handling the session effectively.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Mohit
